query: ok the spec for the rotate-credentials epic is approved and the bd tasks are reviewed — start dispatching. max_parallel=2, mode=waves, worker_model=auto. I want a confirmation summary before any agent kicks off.
/plan-dispatch-fnf max_parallel=3 mode=auto
spec sp012 is ready (all bd tasks at P2 / open under epic bd-9xx). run the pipeline end-to-end, sonnet for everything, only stop on blockers
i have 3 ready epics in the queue and the file targets don't overlap — fire up the scrum master, 4 agents in parallel, auto mode, don't ask me again unless something rejects twice
process the bd ready queue with isolated worktrees per agent, hand each implementer report to a reviewer agent, do it all in the background
execute all the open child tasks under bd-eee (the analyst share-link epic), wave mode so I can sanity check between batches, opus only because the spec mixes domains
kick off the agents on the queue. only-blockers mode. i'll be in a meeting for the next hour
start the scrum-master pipeline on sp007
i want claude to dispatch implementers to all the ready tasks in bd and have a reviewer merge each one when done, with no babysitting
the bd ready queue has 12 tasks across 4 epics, please orchestrate the implementation with max_parallel=3, surface any agent that gets stuck
i want to work through these bd tasks one by one myself with you reviewing my work between batches — supervised mode, no autonomous agents
the bd tasks under bd-aaa don't exist yet, sp005 just got its solution accepted — break it down into the executable plan and attach bd ids
show me what bd ready returns and which epics are active. don't dispatch anything, just orient me on the state of the queue
i'm picking up bd-x1 manually to work on it locally — please pull the design from bd show, claim it, and walk me through TDD
the implementer just reported bd-77 ready for review — audit it against the spec and either close or reject with gap notes
all the child bd tasks of sp007 are closed and merged — run the retro: flip statuses, mint any new ADRs that came up, archive the spec
we keep getting prod bugs even though tests pass at 90% — audit the test suite under src/auth/ and find the tautological ones
the auth middleware has been getting hot — diagnose what's smelly, decide refactor vs rewrite, write up the direction
draft the spec for sp012: the solution shape, which features it consumes, which ADRs constrain it. don't write tasks yet
we have a new story idea: as an analyst i want to share a read-only dashboard link without seat licenses — capture this as a draft user story
